title: E-commerce Product Pricing Matrix with Advanced Filtering

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: E-commerce Product Pricing Matrix with Advanced Filtering

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#411C56`
* `#090a0f`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'><rect x='10' y='10' width='380' height='280' rx='10' fill='#090a0f'/><rect x='20' y='20' width='360' height='260' rx='10' fill='#B7D7CD'/><rect x='30' y='30' width='340' height='240' rx='10' fill='#C06C88'/><g transform='translate(50, 50)'><rect x='0' y='0' width='150' height='30' rx='5' fill='#411C56'/><text x='10' y='20' font-size='18' fill='#FFFFFF' text-anchor='start'>Search:</text><rect x='100' y='0' width='200' height='30' rx='5' fill='#090a0f'/><text x='120' y='20' font-size='18' fill='#FFFFFF' text-anchor='start'>Filter:</text></g><g transform='translate(50, 100)'><rect x='0' y='0' width='150' height='30' rx='5' fill='#411C56'/><text x='10' y='20' font-size='18' fill='#FFFFFF' text-anchor='start'>Product Name:</text><rect x='100' y='0' width='200' height='30' rx='5' fill='#090a0f'/><text x='120' y='20' font-size='18' fill='#FFFFFF' text-anchor='start'>Price:</text></g><g transform='translate(50, 200)'><rect x='0' y='0' width='150' height='30' rx='5' fill='#411C56'/><text x='10' y='20' font-size='18' fill='#FFFFFF' text-anchor='start'>Total:</text></g>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Must implement multiple states (product selection, filter selection, total calculation)
Must use a table for product display

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: E-commerce Product Pricing Matrix with Advanced Filtering

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how closely the layout, colors, and positioning match the target visual mockup.
Verify interactive state updates, filter logic, product selection, and handlers.
Review code cleanliness, proper semantic elements, and efficient state use.
